Target.Name: R_HFE_HZx_4WD_V3
Target.Description:
[V3.0] 2014/09/ FX.MARCQ Release of the DDT Base Add the new projects (xZH, xZI,xZJ, xZG) Modification of the abscissa name of the chart of the 4_Market History (Delta Front-Rear Km/h) Delete the freeze frame for the DTC abs wheel speed sensor and engine signal clack. Modification of the U1010 in $49 instead of $01 Modification of the CAN Support Pannel (name changing) Add the software for HZG M9R CVT in the Auto-identification Add the ODB of the DTC "engine signal clock" Modification of the value $13$01_(f_CANMASK454) because the logic is reversed, it's equal to NOT(DiagMuxOn_BCM)
[V2.0] 2014/02/11 FX.MARCQ Release of the DDT Base
[V1.2] 2014/02/07 FX.MARCQ Modification of the Auto-identification Add a comment in the Active Test panel Costumize the IT-Characteristic panel
[V1.1] 2014/01/07 FX.MARCQ Modification of the Active Test Panel Modification of the request OutputControl the request is $30 $01$20 $00 Add the request OutputControl.init Modification of the active test commands Delete in the request OuputControl.Stop of the parameters OuputPermanentControlList and OuputTemporaryControlList Add a new request OuputControl.Start Delete in the request OuputControl.Status of the parameters OuputPermanentControlList and OuputTemporaryControlList
[V1.0] 2013/11/15 FX.MARCQ Modification DTCdeviceIdentifier 21008 Engine_signal_1 is replaced by Drive Protection Check Add a new DTC and replace in the DTCdeviceIdentifie 6173 Engine Protection Clock 181D Add the Market History display Modication of the numerical data type for V_Tempscalmemo 1,2,3,4 Modication of the numerical data type for Cluload 1,2,3,4 to 10 Modication of the numerical list type for V_Fikei40 Delete in the ouputcontrol request $30010001 of the OutputtemporaryControlList which is equal to OuputPermanantControlList. Delete the signed case for the binary data in the snapshot data Modification of the FFD$0100 DID, delete the mileage#8 data and modification of the number of bytes 29 to 30 Modification of the SoftwareNumber data to a numeric list Modification of the DID FFD$0100 translation of 7 bytes to the left Delete in Data.ReadTraceability request the Tracability_Data parameter Delete and translate 1byte to the left in Data.ReadTraceability request the Tracability_Reserve parameter Add in Data.ReadTraceability request the Tracability_Data parameter Add Tracabilty display Add the Can Support display
[V0.9] 2013/09/24 FX.MARCQ Renamed SupplierNumber.ITG by SupplierNumber.ITG.1 Change the number of byte on the SupplierNumber.ITG.1 on 1 byte. Add a new data SupplierNumber.ITG.2 Modification in the numeric list of the data ManufacturerIdentificationCode for 88h->Renault R2 instead of 5DIGITS LID03_#04_IT_characteristic_1, 2, 3, 4, 5 data type change in No numeric instead of Numeric type.
[V0.8] 2013/06/11 FX.MARCQ Add the IT-Characteristic panel Modification of the request $B3$01 (byte 8 bits 7 to 4 forced to Fh) Add the key lock for the flashing mode
[V0.7]2013/06/06 FX.MARCQ Add a comment for the $2182 frame. This frame mustn't be used for Renault! Creation of the Market srceen
[V0.6]2013/05/06 FX.MARCQ Correction of the database to delete the errors (the frame ReadDTCinformationExtendedData was updated from 10 bytes to 6 bytes) Add the request ReadDTCinformationExtendedDatamileage. (missing)
[V0.5]2013/04/08 A.KAILLANI Change the version diag from 5 to 4 Delet Nissan logiciel reference and add Renault references (5 references)
[V0.4]2013/2/25 XX4 E.Fujino modified for RDBLID, Supported Check etc.
[V0.3]2012/11/15 XX4 D.Muramatsu modified for Database $19$06
[V0.2]2012/7/23 XX4 D.Muramatsu modified for Database $21$21
[V0.1]2012/04/19 XX4 D.muramatsu create for DDT database

Target.Name: 4RD X91 V3.3
Target.Description:
C. CHASSAGNOL 65630 - UET C tel : +331 349 57726 DIAG ON CAN 4RD V3.3 (12/12/05)
ajout d'un écran "Ecriture ref calibration" (utilisant le VIN) ajout d'un écrant "Paramètres internes" Renseignement du BasicPart du part number
Modification par C.CANDAS le 15/12/2005 - Standardisation requête StartDiagnosticSession - Données en référence
Modif pour outils création fichier de config : ajout des templates pour les requetes 21 et 3B

Target.Name: 4RD X91 V4.2
Target.Description:
C. CHASSAGNOL - 65630 - UET C tel : +331 768 57726 Base DDT V4.2 (26/04/06) --> A UTILISER A PARTIR DE LA VAGUE SLOT V1K (juin 2006)
1) requests : - Adding of IOControl RWAPositionRequest Status : allows to know the status of the on-going request - adding of IOControl RWAPositionRequest Stop : allows to stop the on-going request - correction of IOControlRWAPositionRequest Start : changed from permanent to temporary control - adding of Reprog session request ($1085) - adding of templates for 3B and 21 requests (due to configuration file tool evolution) - adding of a data for data recorder request for testing needs - name changed for request 3B1A : "static & dynamic inhibition" changed to "System Inhibition" - text for value 04h of RoutineEntryStatus modified - Adding of value 14h for ouputcontrolStatus of IOControl - StartRoutine - ECU init phase : routine entry option 01 is not supported anymore 2) Screens : - modification of Read/ Write - Enable / disable functions : Musplit functions and developpment frames cannot be activated / inhibited through this screen anymore. Adding of a reset button in screen Read/ Write - Enable / disable Functions - adding of one screen for IOControl - modification of screen StartRoutine - oscillation of actuator 3) DataID - DataRead.MiniConsumptionRequest : value 0 and 3 of parameter MiniConsumptionRequest have been defined - correction of ESP, USM, 4WS and BCM absence flags (to conform to the specification) 4) HW Number basic part changed from 28505 to 28506

Target.Name: 4RD X91 V4.3
Target.Description:
C. CHASSAGNOL - 65630 - UET C tel : +331 768 57726 Base DDT V4.3 - A utiliser à partir de Slot V1K (SW V4)
Screens : * Modification of screens layout and organization * adding of SWA offset * adding of RWSStatus in StartRoutine Oscillation of actuator * adding of Absolute sensor position * adding of Calibration File Checksum * adding of traceability * adding of Reset Function * IOControl : adding of a free RWA Position for more accurate control * adding of DataRecorder screen * adding of Vehicle Speed sign failure flag, Vehicle Speed Gradient failure flag, SWA gradient failure flag
Devices : * adding of Read Requests datarecorder, traceability, Logzone and Calibration File Checksum to the ReadDTC Request. * DTC5842 : text " ECU Internal Relay stuck close or 3-phase connector disconnected" changed for text " ECU Internal Relay stuck close or phase wire open (2 or 3 wires)"
Requests : * DataRecorder Vehicle Conditions detailed (VC1, 2 and 3) * reduction of data recorder data from 701 to 656 bytes * adding of 21F0 request to get HW number

Target.Name: Abs X84 Bosch8.1 V1.3
Target.Description:
Base DiagOnCAN ABS X84 Bosch8.1 V1.3 --------------------------------------------------------------------
Projet : X84 Phase 2 ECU: ABS Bosch 8.1 EA106.20 VDiag: 0Fh
Logiciels concernés : BB38511 v2.5 et 2.7 (prototypes) BB39168 v3.3 (série) BB60786 v4.0 (série)
Base précédente : Abs X84 Bosch8.1 V1.2 Dernière MAJ : 22 FEB 2007
- Modif du : 22 FEB 2007 Rajout de la requête de traçabilité et des paramètres associés Rajout de l'écran de traçabilité
- Modif du : 20 OCT 2006 Rajout version logicielle BB60786 v4.0 Ecran lecture défauts Bosch : mise en exergue ICC courant MAJ écran lecture infos système : correction informations de traçabilité usine Bosch et rajout réf usine Paramètres "Numéro de l'usine de production du bloc", "Numéro de la ligne de production du bloc", "Numéro de l'équipe de production du bloc" mis à jour Rajout d'un seuil rouge pour variante véhicule non configurée Rajout de seuils rouges pour vitesse CAN à l'initialisation non programmée Ecrans routines "Comptage des pôles" et "Test du circuit hydraulique" : changement label premier bloc et changement de mise en page des roues Ecran activation des ev et pompe : rajout temps + précaution ev. + seuils couleur sur statut routine Ecran allumage auto warning : rajout temps + seuil couleur statut routine Ecran infos globales : MAJ seuils couleur vitesses Ecran pneu : MAJ donnée circ. min. ma. (format 000000 -> 0000) et seuil dimension pneu Ecran Process Byte : ajout seuils couleurs Ecrans comptage poles / purge APV / test circuit hydrau / activation capteurs vitesse / config véhicule : ajout seuils couleur Ecran vitesse véhicule filaire : rajout temps+ note tachymétrie + seuil couleur Ecran remplissage usine : rajout temps + seuils couleur Ecran init vitesse : ajout seuil couleur + note --------------------------------------------------------------------
-------------------------------------------------------------------- Diese 65630 Marie-Laure PIEDNOIR Tel : 33737 e-mail :marie-laure.piednoir@renault.com

Projects: BD95-L38- K9KDCT (HSA) ECU : ESP MK60EC VDiag : 04h Applicable diagnosis specification: 6530/2008/79 v1.0
Previous DB: ESP - X95_HSA_Version 0.0
Compliant SW: BD95_HSA F05-1 ESP with data output (NZ3RAA00004) BD95_HSA F05-1 ESP without data output (NZ3RAA00005) BD95_HSA F05-2 ESP with data output (NZ3RAB00005, NZ3RAB00011) BD95_HSA F05-2 ESP without data output (NZ3RAB00006, NZ3RAB00012)
Main modifications / previous DB Officialisation date changed. Removed of SW identifiers which aren't compliant Add of SW HSA F05-1 and F05-2 identifiers DATA: Data "APB - ParkingBrakeStatus" changed to "EPB - ParkingBrakeStatus". Data "EPB - ParkingBrakeStatus invalide" declared in data DTCDeviceIdentifier changed to EPB - ParkingBrakeStatus". DEVICES: "AT - Invalid data received " already declared in data DTCDeviceIdentifier was added to devices. SCREENS: Screen 11: Read GearBox type, the value DCT added to be read in green color Screen 13: all requests [BE]-Write-> Write
Modifications due to changes of X95 DB (3.1-> 3.2) Data "DTCDeviceIdentifier": "Déconnexion fonction ASTM ou AAF ou FBS ou VDL" : label changed to "Déconnexion fonction ASTM ou FBS ou VDL". RS tyres added in "Index tachy"
Modifications due to changes of X95 DB (3.2-> 3.3) Data "VehicleState.Etat du véhicule" : label 3 (démarrage en cours) added Data "Lateral acceleration": changed to "unsigned" Data "DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD": item "Capteur Angle Volant - Time out" (DTC C126) removed. Item "Tableau de Bord - Time out" (DTC 155) removed. Item "Electronic Power Steering - Time out" (DTC C130) added. Device "Reconnaissance tour angle volant" added Data "DTCDeviceIdentifier": label "Reconnaissance tour angle volant" added Data "Offset angle volant": coding changed back to X91's one Screen 21: Notes added.

Target.Name: ADAS Insulator V9
Target.Description:
Pièce : ADAS Insulator Fonction : Isolateur électronique entre le CAN V et le CAN ADAS.
Andrei NITA ASSYSTEM andrei.nita-renexter@renault.com Tel : +40 21 539 0287
jean-francois.camart@renault.com
******************** HISTORY ********************
Novembre 2011 : V1.0 creation
De novembre à décembre : Mise à jour de la base (V2.0, V3.0, V4.0, V5.0)
Fin décembre 2011 : Base V6.0 non officialisé mais envoyé au personne du diag pour vérification
12 avril 2012 : Officialisation de la base V6.1 en base centrale (évolution par rapport à la V6.0 : ajout "Date d'officialisation de la base")
17 septembre 2012 : V6.3 : Mise à jour de la base pour soft V2.00 + remarques du tracklist de Yacine El Ghouch
10 octobre 2012 : V6.3 : Demande d'officialisation en base centrale.
10 janvier 2012 : V6.4 : Suppression du DTC "Virgin Configuration" $9341 à la demande Yacine EL GHOUCH PFE Diagnostique Edison. En effet ce DTC, bien qu'existant dans l'ECU, n'a pas à apparaitre en usine. C'est le Fournisseur qui fait la config (config par defaut 0b00000011 => 2E AC 1D 03) de la pièce avant envoi en usine Renault. Mise à jour des ecrans. Demande d'officialisation en base centrale.
3 juillet 2013 : V6.5 : Demande d'officialisation en base centrale.
12 novembre 2013: V6.6 : Modification de requete $21 82 MaJ SW v3.0
29 January 2014: V6.7 : Auto-Ident Update
21 January 2015: V6.8 : Auto-Ident Update
25 March 2016: V6.9 C. Margescu Updates to SW5.2: $9341 DTC update
31 January 2017: V7 L.Mujdei Auto-Ident Update 31 January 2017: V8 L.Mujdei Auto-Ident Update 31 January 2017: V8 L.Mujdei Auto-Ident Update + application on X07ph2

Target.Name: ADAS_ECU_C1A_V11_6
Target.Description:
PDE: Sara BOUHOUAILI
Generic database for UDS specification ---------------------------------------------------------------
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ V11.3 : 2019-05-2019 : Ajout de la base daimler ainsi que deux routines de reprog V11.2 : 2019-03-29 : Available for ECU ADAS from SW7.3 ( BJA project) V11.1 : 2019-01-18 : Available for SW8.0 and SW 8.1 for ECU ADAS V1.2 : 2011-04-20 : Switch English V1.1 : 2011-02-01 : Laurent TRABATTONI / Olivier BAUX: Sce 65676 : Modification for OutputControl V1.0 : 2010-09-30 : Laurent TRABATTONI : Sce 65676 : Initial release
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ********************************************************************************
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

Target.Name: USA_CMFB_V_2_8
Target.Description:
version 2.7.1 ECU name : USA1 (Low Line) USA2 (High Line) Supplier : Valeo PDE : S.CHEBBI DEA-SAD4
$$$$$$$******Diag Base Updates******$$$$$$$ V2.3 : $1903 "ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshotIdentification" renamed to "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification" ********************************************** V2.4 SW6 Low Line Auto ident Working fine ********************************************** V2.5 SW6.42 & SW6.22 Auto Ident working ********************************************** V2.6 Implementation of snapshot ********************************************** V2.7 Deletion of 6 not-used parameter on GCFG4 (HFP group configuration) (reduced from 81 to 75bytes) ********************************************** V2.7.1 Deletion of BSW_status_led.day and night vision
$$$$$$$******Known issues******$$$$$$$
SW05.41 (High Line) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW05.46 (Low Line) VIN can be set once using the DID F190 in extended mode. Security Access is not supported In case sensor DTCs are healed while the ECU is shutdown, a clear all DTC is necessary to re-align the ECU after startup (VDR_33508) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW06.10 (Low Line) VIN can be set once using the DID F190 in extended mode. Security Access is not supported ********************************************** SW06.20 (High Line) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW06.30 (High Line) Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode ********************************************** SW06.31 (High Line) VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode. Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 ********************************************** SW06.32 (High Line) VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode Diagnostic IO-Control request for Return Control to ECU of the UPA LED is: 2f 20 34 00 00 High Line Auto Ident not working

Target.Name: USA_CMFB_V_3_2
Target.Description:
ECU name : USA1 (Low Line) USA2 (High Line) Supplier : Valeo PDE : S.CHEBBI DEA-SW
$$$$$$$******Diag Base Updates******$$$$$$$ V2.3 : $1903 "ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshotIdentification" renamed to "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification" ********************************************** V2.4 SW6 Low Line Auto ident Working fine ********************************************** V2.5 SW6.42 & SW6.22 Auto Ident working ********************************************** V2.6 Implementation of snapshot ********************************************** V2.7 Deletion of 6 not-used parameter on GCFG4 (HFP group configuration) (reduced from 81 to 75bytes) ********************************************** V2.7.1 Deletion of BSW_status_led.day and night vision ********************************************** V2.9 $202E : 2 bytes shortened, 28byte length instead of 30 $2329 : lenght modification and reused for BSW supplierdata ********************************************** V3.0 AutoIdent SW 6.49 & 6.24 ********************************************** V3.1 AutoIdent SW 6.64 & 6.45 ********************************************** V3.2 DTC modified : A724 $86, $47, $88, $22, $23 (ECU internal DTC) A73B $87 (Rear Sensors power supply) A729, A72A,A72B, A72C,A720,A721,A722,A723,A72E,A72F,A730,A731 fault type $94 removed (removed from SW)
$$$$$$$******Known issues******$$$$$$$ USA1 : VIN update impossible USA2 : VIN update with Secure Access is only supported in the programming mode (10 02) and not in the application mode

Liste des Modifications : - Modification de l'écran "Lignes de Mise à Feu" : suppression des prétensionneurs et ajout des enrouleurs - Modiifcation de la formule des compteurs des Freeze Frame - Modifications datas trame de traçabilité UCE - Modification de la formule de la valeur de la tension alimentation calculateur - Modification de la formule des valeurs mesurées sur les satellites (accélération et non impédance) - Modification de la formule de l'impédance mesurée sur les capteurs de boucle conducteur et passager - Modification de l'écran "Firing Lines Activated" : suppression des prétensionneurs et ajout des enrouleurs - Modification des données associées au télégramme de crash et courbes de crash - Modification de l'écran "Impedance: Firing Lines" : suppression des prétensionneurs et ajout des enrouleurs - Modification de la lecture du service "DTC avant crash" : 10 DTC peuvent être mémorisés - Modification du service "Configuration des organes" : ajout de la possibilité de configurer le témoin inhibition, le témoin SBR, le buzzer SBR, le radio mute, le crashoutput. - Modification du service "Lecture de la configuration des capteurs" : ajout de la lecture de configuration du témoin inhibition, du témoin SBR, du buzzer SBR, du radio mute et du crashoutput - Ajout d'un écran "Configuration : divers" : écriture et lecture de la configuration du témoin inhibition, du témoin SBR, du buzzer SBR, du radio mute et du crashoutput - Ajout des DTC Témoin SBR (90h55h) et Crash Output (90h58h) - Modification des formules associées au service "Correction des impédances des lignes de Mise à Feu" - Modification des formules associées au service "Correction des impédances des capteurs" - Ajout d'un service spécifique pour la corrections des impédances de la clé d'inhibition

2010 October,19th
From SW 2.40 to SW 3.10 the output of the switch status in service $21 $02 (ECU state synthesis) has been changed (i.e. inverted) to match the with TDRC1 requirements. Implementation in SW 3.10: 01b (1) means switch open (for buckle switches), 400 Ohm (for passenger presence sensor or inhibition switch). 10b (2) means switch closed (for buckle switches), 100 Ohm (for passenger presence sensor or inhibition switch). The change is only effective for the service $21 $02. The switch measurement and evaluation itself has not been changed. Other functionalities (detection of short circuit, etc.) are not affected.

Target.Name: RSA_C1A_ACU_CONTINENTAL_V5_1
Target.Description:
V0.1 - 08/04/2016 Creation
V0.5 - 10/10/2016 Update
V0.7 - 22/12/2016 - Update IO Control screens - Change Key State values wording for State synthesis DIDs (A002 & A003) : was 100/400 Ohms --> become 150/300 Ohms - Add Device (DTC) E141 (Loss of communication with ECM) - remove control state "FAULT3 from "IOCTL.ControlState.InhibitionLampCommand" - Update DIDs parameters - Update Devices according to spec update
V0.8 - 17/01/2017 - Improve screens - Change formula conversion for DID A004 parameters : "Reading of the firing line value.Impedance for xxx" - Change formula conversion for DID A006 parameters : Reading of the sensor value.value for driver Seat position sensor Reading of the sensor value.value for passenger Seat position sensor - Change formula conversion for DID A00D parameters : Reading of the sensors thresholds values.Mxxx current state_Seat slide sensor xH - DTC 8050 & 8052 : add fault type $2B - DTC 80A0 : add fault type $55 - DTC E140: remove fault type $22 - DTC E140 / E143/ E148 / E14E / E14F / E152 / E15B / E15F / E176 : Remove fault type $88 Add fault type $81
V1.0 - 26/01/2017 Officialisation based on V0.8
V2.0 - 02/03/2017 Applicable for LE variantes only (= X10 Neo / BJA & HJB 12 FL) Update Auto-identification data with SW 3 Update screens Change DTC mileage resolution DID 3001 (Configuration) : remove read only parameters Update All conversion formula Update EDR DIDs Add Fault type $2B in DTC 8050 / 8052 / 9027 / 9028
V2.1 - 21/06/2017 Traceability data : change type from BCD/HEXE to ASCII
V2.2 - 17/07/2017 - Remove DTC 9500 (not implemented by Continental) - Improve "System description" screens - DTC C073 : Remove fault type $88 Add fault type $81
V3.0 - 06/09/2017 - Update following DIDs (spec updated or correction) : - 2002 / 2003 (Trouble History information A & B) - 2006 (Firing timing) - 201C / 201F (EDR) - Update conversion formula values in DID A006 - Update screens
V3.1 - 20/09/2017 - Delivery to Conti / HIL
V3.2 - 11/10/2017 - Update conversion formula values in DID A006 (2nd row central buckle switch) - snapshot request answer correction - Update screens - Update DID A00C
V3.3 - 16/11/2017 - Change last byte of DID 3001 writing request (configuration) to FF (instead of 00)
V4.0 - 08/03/2018 Add Auto-identification information for SW5 Update Conversion formula of EDR parameters : - Time Max Delta V longi - Vehicle speed indicated - Accelerator pedal, %full pressed - Lateral accemeration - Longitudinal acceleration - Engine RPM - Vehicle Roll angle - Steering input - Longitudinal maximum acceleration - Lateral maximum acceleration - Motor RPM 1 (ICE) - Motor RPM 2 (EV)
V5.0 - 03/07/2018 Add Auto-identification information for SW6
v5.1 - 05/06/2019 Screen Modification Slow Sensor Driver position => Left position Passenger position => Right Position

Target.Name: APB 15-40 V53
Target.Description:
APB 15-40 database
Based on Generic database for UDS specification ---------------------------------------------------------------
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ V3 => first official database W1312 According to APB specification "Req_Diag_APB_Annexe_V12.xls" ------------ V4: According to APB specification "Req_Diag_APB_Annexe_V15.xls"
Remove all information related to TOA mapping parameters which are newly parts of calibration parameters Add DID for identification ---------------------- V5: Adaptation of DID Vehicle_Configuration (remove checksum parameter and update data length) to be compliant with diagnostic specification ----------------------------- V51: Modification of DID ($0220) parameter mapping due to wrong offset definition set up. Add "Routine Contro Type" data in all routine control request. ----------------------------------- V52: Add DTC list in Data DTCDeviceIdentifier -------------------------------------------- V53: Add TRW missing DTC $50C3 53: "FC_ELECTRONIC_ECU; FC_FactoryMode: EVENT_CONTROL_MODULE_DEACTIVATED" $5003 77: "FC_BRAKE_INCOHERENT; Mechanical Failure: Commanded position not reachable" $5006 01: "FC_EPB_SWITCH_FAILURE; General Electrical Failure" $50CB 09: "FC_DEMAND_LAMP; Component Failure" $5100 09: "FC_ACTUATOR_RIGHT; Component Failure" $5101 09: "FC_ACTUATOR_LEFT; Component Failure"

VDIAG $0C deleted because ultralow variant deleted Identification ID $F180 and $F182 deleted Identification ID $F188 moved to Identification Info and removed from Identification config

V0.5 11/04/2019: Value corrected for HBC as 3 instead for 4 Acoustic_Whole_Car1 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car2 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car3 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car4 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car5 byte length modified to 450 instead of 440 Acoustic_Whole_Car6 newly added in configuration DID $2153

The length of Phone Acoustic parameters.WB 6 (0x2151)is updated to 500Bytes SystemSupplierECUsoftwareNumber (0xF194) length is changed from 4 to 10. SystemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber (0xF195) length is changed from 4 to 10. SystemSupplierNumber (0xF18A) length is changed to 10 Bytes. The control State $02 is added for the IO Control TUNER SETTINGS ($9001) CNF_PACT_WB6 parameter byte length changed to 500 bytes as per spec Add XJD and X82ph2 projects applicability Add SW 4 Auto Identification for VC milestone

v0.1 27/04/2012 : Creation and compliance with DTS 1.7 DRAFT v0.2 13/07/2012 : Compliance with DTS 1.8 v0.3 08/10/2012 : - Compliance with DTS 1.9 - Addition of default value for writing configuration parameters - Addition of comments for each data - Deletion of the automatic reset in "write" button and addition of a "reset" button v0.4 04/01/2013 : - Compliance with DTS 2.0 v0.5 30/05/2013 : - Rename of CNF_ECU_FM2 and CNF_CAR_MAN v0.6 26/06/2013 : - CNF_ECU is available in aftersales - Database is available for HFE v0.7 27/06/2013 - CNF_PACT goes from 2000 bytes to 1640 bytes v0.8 08/07/2013 - Compliance with DTS 2.1 v0.9 25/07/2013 - Maintainability report checked for HMI Configuration Read & Write v1.0 17/10/2013 - Compliance with DTS 2.2 & 2.3 v1.1 22/10/2013 - Updated IO Control labels & few Screens v1.2 10/01/2014 - Added DID F013 & automatic refresh issue resolved v1.3 10/03/2014 - Compliance with DTS 2.4 v1.4 30/01/2015 - Compliance with DTS 2.5 & 2.6 & 2.7 v1.5 31/08/2015 - Compliance with DTS 2.8 & 2.9 - Update of Resolution and Offset for CNF_PARGU parameters - Map data country list updated - Description & Mnemonic updated for Read only DID's & IO Controls - Update of Auto identification details v1.6 29/01/2016 - Maintainability report checked for RadNav Configuration 2.0 Read & ADAS Configuration Read & Write - Due to DDT tool update(2.9.0.9) IO Control requests are updated in order to remove error, Auto Ident $FFFF Removed & new Auto idents added - $F195 updated to 5 Bytes v1.7 03/03/2016 - Maintainability report checked for Antitheft v1.8 06/04/2016 - Addition of Vehicle type confidential code, Maintainability checked for read request of $2111,$2123,$2303 - Auto ident for Gen1.1 added v1.9 13/05/2016 - Addition of new Auto Ident v2.0 06/01/2017 - Addition of new Auto Idents v2.1 20/03/2017 - Addition of DID $2133 v2.2 21/06/2017 -Template field in $222133 is updated. v2.3 25-7-2017 - Modification done for DTS MM2014_ Diagnostic_v3.7.doc - DID $2131 mnemonics and name modified. - DID $2130 byte 2 bit 7 added as Baidu Carlife (=1 if present, = 0 if not) In DID $2008, Radio country : value $09=Brazil added. In DID $2001, $2C English (Australian) added. In DID $2123, Byte 3 bit 0 added as CF_Heel_Toe_Shifting_UsedByMex Monitoring DID $1009, $1010 added Configuration DID $2304, $2305, $2306, $2307, $2132, $2135 are added
v2.4 by Corentin Updates: new autoidents and 1 mnemonic modified in $2131 from CNF_SPVR_NBS to CNF_SPVR.
v2.5 25-Jan-2018 - Modification done for the below as per DTS MM2014_ Diagnostic_v4.1.doc DID $2132 removed DID $2131 & $2118 are modified to handle 2.X diversity with length 2000 bytes.

Target.Description:
Source : Central database / Engineering / Norme 36-00-013b : Request for reading service 19 in specification B
By Christophe CANDAS Sce : 65676
2011-04-20 : Add Template description in receive request
================================================================
v1.0 (09/02/2015) : Created by Gilles BRUST for 7kW charger project (b1r2p0 sw, soft number = 0103 or 0104) v2.0 (11/02/2015) : G.BRUST. For 7kW charger project (>= b1r3p0 sw, soft number = 0105) test v2.1 (25/01/2016) : S. MONIN. 7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v20-->7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v21 (Feb 12, 2016 SMO) - Correction Supplier number 147 --> 93H - Addition of SWs (0105.0100, 0200.0000, 0300.0000, 0300.0100, 0400.0000, 0400.0100, 0401.0000, 0401.0100, 0500.0000, 0500.0100, 0500.0200) - Maintenability removed for some services v2.2 (03/05/2016) : S. MONIN 7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v20-->7kW_Charger_b1r3p0_v22 (May 3, 2016 SMO) - Maintenability added for DID data - HardwareNumber.BasicPartList and PartNumber.BasicPartList corrected - Addition of SWs (0600.0000, 0600.0100) v3.0 (03/05/2016) : S. MONIN 7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_v30 (May 3, 2016 SMO) for SW number 0700 - DTC Device numbers modified v3.1 (Nov 30, 2016) : S. MONIN 7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_v31 - Supply Voltage device renamed to Supply Voltage / EVC - DTCs added: - EVC missing message - Supply Voltage overcurrent - HW Basic Part list corrected - $21F0 service (logzone 0) added - Unused extended data services removed ($1906xxxxxx84 - 87) - double of $220120 service removed - DIDs updated - Supply current ($303D) added - Reset Reason ($3004) added (replacing SafeState) - Addition of SW 0800.0000 v3.2 (Dec 20, 2016) : S. MONIN - Work-around for AR CHG_98 (HW Basic part list): - 0 = 296A1 - 2 = N/A - (Ideally, should be 0 = N/A, 1 = 296A1 but SW correction required) v3.3 (Jan 12, 2017) : S. MONIN - Work-around for ApprovalNumberBasicPartList (blocking CLIP tests) - 30 = 00000 - (Ideally, should be 0 = 00000, but SW correction required and impact of change on already-produced chargers not identified)
v3.4(December 04, 2017) : F.BOURDAIS - Name modification : 7kW_Charger_D2r0p0_vXX => 7KW_Charger_C1R_vXX (link to the EE Architecture) - Project x62 added - New parameter available for the maintenance - Read CHGFault_Type - Read CHGLoadingInterlockState - Read Terminal 30 voltage - Read ACInputFrequency - Read HVVoltage - Read HVOutputCurrent - Read CHGWaterTemp - Read CHGTemp - Read SupplyCurrent - Read CHGAvailableChargingPower - Read PowerDeratingStatus - Read HVOutputPower

P5.20 - replacement of screen "CLUTCHES TEACH-IN" by screens "CLUTCHES TEACH-IN STEPS 1, 2, 3" - request $3B2500 substituted by $3B2501 and $3B2502 - request $3B2600 substituted by $3B2601 and $3B2602 - request $3B2700 substituted by $3B2701 and $3B2702 - request $3B2A00000000 substituted by $3B2A01000002 and $3B2A02000002 - request $3B2B00000000 substituted by $3B2B01000002 and $3B2B02000002 - request $3B2C00000000 substituted by $3B2C01000002 and $3B2C02000002 - request $3B2E00 substituted by $3B2E01 and $3B2E02 - addition of requests $3B2901000002, $3B2901000002, $3B2902000002, $3B2F01000002, $3B2F02000002, $3B3301000002 and $3B3302000002 - update of data resolution "green clutch counter" and "Green clutch flag" - addition of datas "Routine Response Code" and "Data Byte 1 to 6" - modification of requests $3101010001, $3101010002, $310301, $310501, $3105010001, $3105010002, $1306010001, $3106010002, $310701, $310801, $3109010001, $3109010001, $310E01, $310F01, $313E01, $316701, $313D01 - suppression of DIDs from $2D50 to $2E65 - suppression of most unused data - addition of DTC AAAA - screens "Reset Clutch Data", "Set Clutch Data", "Output Control" and "Clutches Replacement Teach-in" moved to Developpement section

New requests added: $21$A9 --> Roller bench state $3B$A9 --> Modify roller bench state Requests format modified for: $3B$2A $31$05 $31$0D $3B$2C --> removed additional byte from response Requests deleted acording to supplier specification and validation on car: $3B$2B $21$2B $21$5B 3B0000000000 Vdiag changed to $0C to correspond to new euro 6 applications Screens for MAM aftersales replacement and Clutch replacement, reworked to correspond to Getrag specifications, to be more user friendly and to avoid entering continuos loops Deleted test screen because it was used only for validatinig DDTbase Added bench mode control screen Updated clutch toucpoint screen with reference values

Write Race-Start counter Corrected request format for service $32 Corrected Screen $21A8 from aftersales (it contained request from $21A3 instead of $21A8) Deleted Screen with request $21A3 because on some SW version the request still puts ECU to busy state Added the screen Shiftdrum positions Added value 6 for data: FF TRS.TRS Error Launch control screen updated Corrected double request $10C0 (removed the one that was not used and kept the other)
V1.5: Corrected comments on launching screen to be better understood

Target.Description:
Historic
v1.0 Initial version v1.1 09/2013 Updates based on pre DED/DFS 100% delivery (doc html 7DCT300_RSA_TCU_diagnosis_20130730_D08.html) v1.21 09/2013 Updates based on differences between 7DCT300_RSA_TCU_diagnosis_20130730_D08.html and DED/DFS 100% 1.30 11/2013 Updates based on the delivery 100% + (7DCT300_DED/DFS_20131030_D0.6.pdf) 1.31 DRAFT 30/01/2017 Update V4 for AS1
DW5_3100_v2.6 livré le 14/09/2015 List of DTC deleted because not present un DED/DFS V1.4 Shift lock output 0929 14 Clutch 1 torque signal plausibility failure 1864 64 Clutch 2 torque signal plausibility failure 1865 64 TCU over temperature 1907 4B Park LED output 1950 12 Park LED output 1950 14 level 2 reset - SZ5a unwanted shifting from N>>R AAB2 47 level 2 reset - SZ5b unwanted shifting from N>>D AAB3 47 Update of DIDF182 length :2oct ( it was 10 pb with wlip)
DW5_3100_v2.7 livré le 06/10/2015 Modification of DIDF182 length :2 octet de début 1
DW5_3100_v2.8 livré le 8/02/2016 modification de l'auto identification ajout de toutes les trames ident pour PT1 PT2 PP sur toutes les lignes projet.
DW5_3100_v2.91 livré le 16/02/2016 Add generic request OutputControl with $2F Add data OutputPermanentControlList, OutputControlCommand & Output Control Status to match with OutputControl request Update DID $2212, $2213, $2214, $2215 et $213C relatif au comptage de launch control -> Mauvaise décalaration de données Data update DTCDeviceIdentifier & add missing DTC & delete unused DTC Deleted "IO" request from $2F
DW5_3100_v2.9.1 livré 17/02/2016
Update display DTC $1932 correction on DID vbi_shft_lev_tip_plus_flg_if defined on 7 bytes
DW5_3100_v2.9.2 livré 29/03/2016
Update data/Request/DID l2s_ffd_errlog_info_if, Data Temperature Sensor signal, pressure sensor signal, vehicle speed from ABS CAN, front wheel speed Screen & Autoident Upgraded Add DID $2227
DW5_3100_v3 livrée 12/05/2016 Add DTC for button box (TbC) Put vbi_shdr_ctr_remain_est_if on 1 bytes, BIOS_buffer and buffer_gti on 20bytes and ffd buffer to 20 bytes Add new screen for touch point teach-in
DW5_3100_v3.2 livrée 1/08/2016 Ajout ident SW850 et SW920 Ajout DTC $1828 CAN signal button box Modifications des écrans
V4 05/12/2016 Mise à jour de la base (DED/DFS utilisé 7DCT300_DUD_20161120_D1.10_final)
Mise à jour les nom de DTCs pour les boutton BOX Ajout des DTCs allimentation du capteur Input shaft speed ainsi que les DID Ajout des DTCs pour les allimentations des capteurs pour ISS, et d'autre DTCs pour
V5.01 : Mise à jour des Auto-identification SW DW30 : Corentin LOISEAU
Rajout dans les bases d'auto identification des SW 95C, 95C1, 86D, 95F
V5.2 : Corentin LOISEAU 03/07/2018 Rajout du DTC 0615 "Starter relay" pour applications C1N.
V5.3: ONICA Silviu Added DIDs for Configuration for DFull Applications:$2FA1, $2FA2, $2FA3, $2FA4, $2FA5 AutoIdent update for:3100_9790 (VDIag$28); 3100_9900 (VDIag$28) XZG/XZGph2 added in the applicability list Updated DTC list
Added W requests 2E222801/2E2222803 - Green Clutch Green Clutch screen created In order to comply with V1.10 checker rules, the below updates were made without any functional impact: -req 1103 /1101: response shorted from 6-->2bytes -req 2F000000 : only the mask response extended from 3 to 6bytes -Maintainability report disabled for requests: 2701, 2702, 2703, 2704 -Added DataRead requests for 221001,221002,221003,221004,221005,221006,221007 71010402 71020402 71010401 71010404 71020410 71020401 71010411 71020411 71010412 71020412 71030412 71010413 71020413 71010414 71020414 71030414 71010415 71020415 71010416 71020416 71010403 71020417 71010417 71010410

Target.Name: DW6_2540_v5.3
Target.Description:
BVA DW6 TCU
Software version : 2540 - 2541 series (DiagOnCAN) Vehicle : JFC, XFD, XFA, X82, BFB 14th March 2018 Authors : Asmaa BELLOUATI (ALTRAN)
Historic :
V5.0 : Added of specific DTC for C1A project
V4.3: Modification of the calculation methode of Stroke teached data clutch 1 and 2
V4.2: Added fault types $11 and $13 for DTC $0826 Added fault types $11 and $13 for DTC $0827
V4.1: Added new screen for aftersale XFB RS launch control Added new DIDs $2DE1 and 2C69
V4.0: Update Transmission Teach in procedure screen with comments and extended session for Button 4 Start Stroke Pressure Teachin Update of parameter data in screens Update of aftersale data in screens
v3.9:
-Update the screen for Teach In
v3.8 :
-Modification of Service 1906 -Add application on X82 -Enlargement of cells
v3.7 :
- Enlargement of cells
v3.4 :
- Add applications on XFD and XFA
v3.3 :
- Modification data name Failure reactions 10.b58 to Failure reactions 10.b60 - Erase unmeaning data from Freeze frame DIDs
v3.2 : Update according to SW 2540_620 new services implementation
- Add DIDs - DID 2F6F "Deactivation of Rear Wheel Vehicle speed calculation on Roll Bench "
- Add, service Request deactivation of Rear Wheel Vehicle speed calculation on Roll Bench - Add screen modification (add button for Request deactivation of Rear Wheel Vehicle speed calculation on Roll Bench
v3.1
- Screen "counter Reset : esthetic modifcation
v3.0
- Correction expected answer of $31 (position of Routine Info/Type changed to 5th byte) - Add DIDs - DID 2F66 "Boost 1 adaption data" - DID 2F67 "Boost 2 adaption data" - DID 2F68 "MultiDrive Mode AT" - DID 2F69 "SCU fail safe occurrence counter - DID 2F6A "SCU pattern occurrence counter - DID 2F6B "SCU true occurrence counter - DID 2F6C "SCU false occurrence counter - DID 2F6D "SCU CAN frame occurrence counter - DID 2F6E "SCU freeze occurrence counter - DID F012 "OperationalReference"
- Add, service Reset SCU Failure occurence counter - Add "Reset SCU Failure occurence counter" at routine identifier data - Add Screens and information
- Change Severity level for failures : - 082612 - 082712 - C14088 - C41508 - D12008
- Correction - Changement position of RoutineStatus and RoutineType in the $31 expected answer
v2.2
- Minor change screen (wording) - Add DTC 170C and fault type 01 : Serial Link
v2.0
- Remove SendKey, RequestSend service for level 3 security acces - Add, service Reset Mex Autodetection - Add "Reset Mex Autodetection" at routine identifier data - Add DID 2F65 - Modification of service ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot record number mask to $1904000000FF - Modication description of DTC Cxxx et Dxxx according to DED update - Add ATCU reset services (1101 et 1102) - Add screen for teachIn process - Add srceen for reccorded data visualisation - Modification DID F197 (changed to ascii format), F194 et F195 (lenght)
v1.2 - DTC 0826, fault type 11 deleted - DTC 0826, fault type 13 deleted - DTC 0827, fault type 11 deleted - DTC 0827, fault type 13 deleted - DTC C117 88 deleted
- Modification du Service 31010202 : On demande SelfTest
- Ajout DID 2F62, 2F63 et 2F64
v1.1 - Nommenclature modification - Remove DID 2F16 and 2F17 (#67J) - Add DID FD00 and FD01 (#69) - Add service $27 $01 and $27 $02 (#70) - Add service for VIN writting (#11)
v1.0.2 - Correction name of service $310103FF03 (#112)
v1.0.1 - Provisory additionnal data for DID F194, F195 in order to can read in specific screen the calibration name
v1.0 Initial data base version for SW500 containing : - Complete DTC description - Complete DID integration - Basic screen - Service description ($10, $14, $19, $22, $31, $3E)

Evolution par rapport à V2: - Ajout de 2 compresseurs dans CL_CompType - Ajout de 3 pays pour la config CL_CountryCfg - Correction des nom des datas et requetes utilisés par les services $2E et $22 (DID) - Ajout de K, H et R95 dans CL_VehicleType - correction du format de la variable StatusOfDTC - ajout request ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage - renommage request 2180 en DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2 - suppression de la request $117FF00

Target.Name: 5DH DCDC 29bits V2.0
Target.Description:
Generic database for UDS specification ---------------------------------------------------------------
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ******************************************************************************** This base is used only for HW BDV(CAN ID 29bits) for SW432
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

3 power connectors: 48 volts (orange), 12 volts (red) and 1 common ground. 1 signal connector (RH12 from Yazaki) : - Pin 1 : Waterpump ground - Pin 2 : Waterpump supply - Pin 3 : CAN L1 - Pin 4 : CAN L2 - Pin 7 : Waterpump control - Pin 8 : WakeUpSleepCMD (wake-up with ground from ECM) - Pin 9 : CAN H1 - Pin 10 : CAN H2
CAN Messaging : v32

- The maintainability report is enabled for all the requests

Jean-Paul Mersseman société AKKA Technologie.

Modifications logiciel ================= - Soft 31A1 Correction des RA : * RA 101, 102 Detection de la perte du +bat nettement meilleure ! * RA 36 : Après un cleardiag, plus de levée de DTC avant réveil suivant. * RA xx : ClearDiag déconnecte le capteur d'angle Découverte BUG : * RA 159 : témoin service pendant phase +DEM ( désactivation du DIAGMUX ECM)
- Soft 31A2 Correction du RA : * RA 159 : témoin service pendant phase +DEM ( désactivation du DIAGMUX ECM) Découverte BUG : * RA 322 : Pb perte de communication avec ECU Brake à basse tension & Pb non communication avec ECUs BSM et ECM lors démarrage +APC a une tension infieur de 10,5 Volts * RA 327 : Ecrassement de l'historique
Modification Base DDT2000 ======================
- Ajout des trames $3E - Modification freeze frame derating.

Target.Name: CONNECT420_E044_00.00.21.ddt
Target.Description:
The diagnostic variant "E041" is created for the first FUP3-SW for VAN model lines VS11 and VS30. It is based on diagnostic variant "C5_E041b" from ECU "IC177" and includes the following adaptions:
- Deactivating of all IC-only services
- Adding of VAN-specific variant codings (incl. VS11-specific parameters)
- Adding of REN part numbers for VS11

Target.Name: HFCK (Kit Main Libre Evolué)
Target.Description:
Calcultateur du Kit Main Libre Evolué Projet X73 /X74ph2/X77/X81/X81ph2 Version Soft : Release 7 Juillet 2004
Release 9 : Correction de l'erreur sur le "choix de la langue" - Mauvais codage sur Espagnol / Italien / Portugais et Hollandais Release 8 : DTC $932A : paramètres accoutiques non valides Release 7 : remise à jour de la base + DTC 9316 + téléchargement paramètres accoustiques Release 6 : Mise en coformité par rapport à la livraison 1.3 du DIAG Release 5 : Mise en conformité par rapport à la livraison 1.2 du Diag A niveau pour version C2 Release 4 : Mise en conformité par rapport à la livraison 1.1 du Diag (évolutions mineures) A Niveau pour version C1 Release 3 : Ajout des Ecrans Release 2 : Prise en compte des évolutions & remarques Release 1 : Création de la base.
Damien DELCROIX 54 043 damien.delcroix-renexter@renault.com

Target.Name: IKEY_X62_V_1_6
Target.Description:
Version 1.1 Valid for Software : SW1
Version 1.0 : Initial Release for X62 SW1 ================================= Reste à faire : - Metre à jour BP pièce et Hardware - Mettre à jour les LIDs en lecture avec la définition X62 et dénommer "Left" and "right" au lieu de DR and AS
Version 1.1 : MaJ . Ecran CAN network management . Ecran Traceability identification
Version 1.2 : MaJ . Ecran Keyfob learning . Ecran I_O_Control antenna
Version 1.4 : MaJ - Suppression de la requête $30$00 - Suppression de la requête $21$00 - Suppression "Manuel Send" de la trame $21$01 - Suppression de la donnée "ManufacturerIdentificationCode"
Version1.5 : MàJ - Ajout de la trame 21 0B permettant de lire l'historique - Optimisation nom des data et noms des requetes

Target.Name: IKEY_X62_V_1_9
Target.Description:
Version 1.7 Valid for Software : SW1.3
Version 1.0 : Initial Release for X62 SW1 ================================= Reste à faire : - Metre à jour BP pièce et Hardware - Mettre à jour les LIDs en lecture avec la définition X62 et dénommer "Left" and "right" au lieu de DR and AS
Version 1.1 : MaJ . Ecran CAN network management . Ecran Traceability identification
Version 1.2 : MaJ . Ecran Keyfob learning . Ecran I_O_Control antenna
Version 1.4 : MaJ - Suppression de la requête 30 00 - Suppression de la requête 21 00 - Suppression "Manuel Send" de la trame 21 01 - Suppression de la donnée "ManufacturerIdentificationCode"
Version1.5 : MaJ - Ajout de la trame 21 0B permettant de lire l'historique - Optimisation nom des data et noms des requetes
Version1.6 : MaJ - La requête 3B 81 a été modifiée en "Manuel send" - La requête 21 01 a été modifiée en "Manuel send"
Version 1.7 : MaJ - La requête 31 06 01 a été ajoutée - La requête 31 01 11 a été modifiée en 31 01 11 00 - La requête 30 08 11 20 a été modifiée en 30 03 11 20 - La requête 30 03 11 20 a été modifiée en 30 08 11 20 - La requête 3B 13 01 a été modifié en 3B 13 00 01 - Ajout écran et requêtes "Memory 1 and 2 deletion" - Modification écran et requêtes "VIN" - MaJ des DTC
Version 1.8 : MaJ - La réponse 7813 a été modifiée en 7B 13 - MaJ de la désignation "StartDiagnosticSession" - Utilisation de la requête "DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2" - Suppression de la requête "Renault Identification System" - MaJ de l'écran "Traceability identification"
Version 1.9 : MaJ - Ajout de la requête "Traceability information" - MaJ de l'écran "Traceability identification" - Ajout de l'écran "History"

Target.Name: DCM12 - L4C8 - v7.0
Target.Description:
Injection Common Rail DELPHI DDCR
Applications : X65/X76/X90 Logiciels : L4C8
REPROG ON CAN : le DCM1.2 - L4C supporte la reprog On CAN. Pour cela il faut sélectionner CAN250 puis avec un click droit sur le calculateur détecté, choisir : "Set Protocol" puis "Diag On Can".
Date : 13/11/06 Auteur : Rémy COUTURIER Email : remy.couturier-renexter@renault.com Tél : +34 983 42 8677 API : VLL 4AP 127
--------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence
Datas, trames et services : Document de spécification des services de diagnostique DELPHI R6512094 issue 4.0 Fichier de fautes : A_DG_FLT_L4C8_XXX_XXX_YYY_YYYY(1.0).xls
--------------------------------------------------- Historique
Version 7.0 : - Ajout de l'auto identification pour le soft L4C80, - Modification du nom des variables MDP_OL_PULSE_START_OFS_INJi_NVT[j] par MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJi_NVT[j], - Modification de la variable Vehicle_speed [km/h] : passage en mode signé, - Modification de la varialble AC_comp_pressure : passage en mode signé, - Ajout des statuts spécifiques : 1_ $8D : Fault during power latch, 2_ $8E : Over temperature, 3_ $91 : Cruise On/Off switch.

Target.Name: DCM12 - L4CB1 - v9.3
Target.Description:
Injection Common Rail DELPHI DDCR
Applications : X35/X65/X76/X79/X90 Logiciels : L4CB1
REPROG ON CAN : le DCM1.2 - L4C supporte la reprog On CAN. Pour cela il faut sélectionner CAN250 puis avec un click droit sur le calculateur détecté, choisir : "Set Protocol" puis "Diag On Can".
Date : 11/06/09 Auteur : Application Logiciel Contrôle Moteur DCM12, UET Contrôle GMP Centre de coût : QBB5032 API : RO RTR NG2 1 06 Contact : Chef de projet application logiciel CGMP --------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence
Datas, trames et services : Document de spécification des services de diagnostique DELPHI R6512094 issue 7.0 Fichier de fautes : A_DG_FLT_L4CA_XXX_XXX_YYY_YYYY(1.0).xls
--------------------------------------------------- Historique Version 9.3 : - Suppression du Vdiag $08 pour les logiciels L4CA0 et L4CA1 - Ajout Vdiag $08 pour le soft L4CB1 et L4DB0 - Ajout la variable Acc_decode_test_performed dans la trame $A1 service $21
Version 9.2 : - Mise à jour de la requete "WriteMemotyByAdress", - Mise à jour de l'écran C2i data frame avec la trame "ReadData.InjectorCode.All", - Suppression de la trame "Frame all Cylinders" - Suppression des requêtes "C2I Recording - Cylinder n" et "C2I Recording - All Cylinders" - Suppression de la donnée "C2I Cylinders 1 to 4" - Mise à jour des devices "Injector Circuit/Open - Cylinder n"
Version 9.1 : - Ajout de l'auto identification pour le soft L4CA1 avec vdiag $08, - Mise à jour du titre de chaque écran "Functions", - Evolution de format (00.00) des variables EGRV_Ctrl_regul_error, EGR_Pos_offset_delta_first, EGR_Pos_offset_delta_last.

Target.Name: DCM12 - L4DB0 à L4DB5 - v12.0
Target.Description:
Injection Common Rail DELPHI DCM1.2
Applications : X44, J61, J77, X84, X84ph2, X85, Logiciels : L4DB
!!! Touts les bases DCM1.2 - L4D sont utilisées avec la base CAN 500 kbps !!!
Date : 14/09/2009 Auteur : Adrian IOSOB Application Ingénieur DIM/DCMAP-CGMP, DCM 1.2 Renault Technologie Roumanie RORTRNG1106 email : adrian.iosob@renault.com
--------------------------------------------------- Documents de référence
DTC et données d'environnements : A_DG_FLT_L4DB0_XXX_XXX_YYY_YYYY_1_0.xls Datas, trames et services : R6510596 ISSUE 30.0 - Diagnostic services for Diag On CAN (X84 Euro 4) Base DDT2000 DCM12 - L4DB0 à L4DB3 - v11.7 --------------------------------------------------- Historique
Version 12.0 - Ajout commentaire pour preciser l'utilisation avec la base CAN 500 kbps

Release History 1) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v1.0 (by Seokju KIM,20080615) - based on "ECM_L43&L47_Hitachi_draft_2.xml" from Mr.Sasaki - sorted out Gasoline reltive data 2) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v2.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20080822) - Modify Diagnosis information for L43_M4R_SOFT4 - Correct errors in check database function 3) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v3.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20080826) - Modify DeviceName 5) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v4.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20080904) - Modify RMBA adress information for L43_M4R_SOFT4 - Add missed DID items - Correct endian rules - Correct data setting(size, unit, bitrate) - Status Request Button added in SCREEN 6) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v5.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20081017) - Modify RMBA adress information for L43_M4R_SOFT4.2 7) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v5.1 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20081021) - Correct IOCBLID service(DEC->HEX) 8) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v6.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI.2009.01.28) - Modify Diagnosis information for L43_M4R_SOFT5.2 9) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_v7.0 (by ToshikazuSASAKI,20090602) - Modify RMBA adress information for L43_M4R_SOFT7 10) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_011070 (by SeokjuKIM,20090603) - Modigy SCREEN
9) ECM_L43_731_Hitachi_PS (by SeokjuKIM.20090603)

Target.Description:

Sylvain Lannot - Eric Pasteau
Deltas par rapport à la base précédente : ================================
V1=>Rajout de la trame 317F pour reinit contenu EEPROM (permet d'effacer le défaut EEprom qui apparait lorsque le calculo est débranché en phase de power-latch) M9R780 Vdiag 14h : Bougies configurables GLP4 ou GLP5 M9R780 Vdiag 16h, M9R782 tout Vdiag : GLP5 trame AD: IMA passage de 27bytes a 31 requetes FF-8518 et 8521: passage de 16 a 17 octets
V0=>Passage en Soft W94c Rajout de la config bougie lente / bougie rapide, Modif de la Trame AE Rajout d'un DTC : 1670h 2 nouveaux Vdiag : 14h pour BVM et 16h pour BVR
================================
V7=> Association organe pour requètes des freeze frame HS Pression Clim Circuit + boitier Prechauffage Perte de Com BVA Tension batterie
V6 =>Modification du screen Limiteur / PTO - trame $69 : Suppression des labels RVI en Ecriture : Vitesse max (km/h) Limiteur de vitesse
Modification du screen IMA - ISA : Mise en adéquation des datas Correction injecteur en lecture et écriture
Récupération de l'écran Estimation usure d'huile du G9U (copy right AD).
Dans le Screen Clim / Chauffage : Modification du nom Etat erreur Clim => Etat Clim Ajout de l'info Température d'air Insertion des valeurs borne DF Filaire (spec VU)
Rajout du nouveau V diag

Target.Name: BMS1 SED_SW510
Target.Description:
CAREFUL : This database will only be fully compliant with BMS1 SED from SW300 to 510 If BMS has SW600, please use database BMS1_SED_SW600 If BMS has SW610, please use database BMS1_SED
If the proper database is not used, there are risks of having unknown DTCs and some DIDs will not be correctly computed.
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the managemServices ent of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ v 1.2 : 2011-04-20 : Switch English v 1.1 : 2011-02-01 : Laurent TRABATTONI / Olivier BAUX: Sce 65676 : Modification for OutputControl v 1.0 : 2010-09-30 : Laurent TRABATTONI : Sce 65676 : Initial release
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ********************************************************************************
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

If the wrong database is used, you might have some unknown DTC and some DIDs will not compute correctly.
SW610 update : 18/07/2015 :
- DIDs update for APV tool. "Format" added for DID : $9175 ,$9176, $91D4, $91D5, $9809, $9005, $9006, $9010, $900B, $9011, $912A, $900C, $900D, $900E, $9007, $9009 All Cell Voltages (1 to 20) ==> $9021 to $ 9034 $912D, $91DA, $9008, $900A, $901E, $901F, $900F, $91C6, $91C7, $9801, $9803, $9802, $9804, $980A, $91C2, $91C9
- DID $91C6 and $91C7 set to R/W DIDs (used to be Read only) - DID $9801 and $9803 : Set to 16 bits (was 8 bits) - DID $9802 and $9804 : Set to 40 bytes (instead of 20) - DID $91DE : Created. Specific SED Project - DID $91D6 and $91D7 : Unit changed to W/s
SW600 update : May 2015
19/05/2015 : Update for extended datas display on DDT2000 04/06/2015 : Screen update.

- DIDs update for APV tool. "Format" added for DID : $9175 ,$9176, $91D4, $91D5, $9809, $9005, $9006, $9010, $900B, $9011, $912A, $900C, $900D, $900E, $9007, $9009 All Cell Voltages (1 to 20) ==> $9021 to $ 9034 $912D, $91DA, $9008, $900A, $901E, $901F, $900F, $91C6, $91C7, $9801, $9803, $9802, $9804, $980A, $91C2, $91C9
- DID $91C6 and $91C7 set to R/W DIDs (used to be Read only) - DID $9801 and $9803 : Set to 16 bits (was 8 bits) - DID $9802 and $9804 : Set to 40 bytes (instead of 20) - DID $91DE : Created. Specific SED Project - DID $91D6 and $91D7 : Unit changed to W/s
SW600 update : May 2015
19/05/2015 : Update for extended datas display on DDT2000 04/06/2015 : Screen update.
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the managemServices ent of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ v 1.2 : 2011-04-20 : Switch English v 1.1 : 2011-02-01 : Laurent TRABATTONI / Olivier BAUX: Sce 65676 : Modification for OutputControl v 1.0 : 2010-09-30 : Laurent TRABATTONI : Sce 65676 : Initial release
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ********************************************************************************
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

Target.Name: RBMS_MCPU_SW1xx_3xx_V1.0
Target.Description:
BMS DDT Database only compliant for SW BMS1_SW3xx. Not to be used for others SW versions.
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the managemServices ent of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ v 1.2 : 2011-04-20 : Switch English v 1.1 : 2011-02-01 : Laurent TRABATTONI / Olivier BAUX: Sce 65676 : Modification for OutputControl v 1.0 : 2010-09-30 : Laurent TRABATTONI : Sce 65676 : Initial release
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ********************************************************************************
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

Target.Name: BMS2 SED_SW510
Target.Description:
CAREFUL : This database will only be fully compliant with BMS2 SED from SW300 to 510 If BMS has SW600, please use database BMS2_SED_SW600 If BMS has SW610, please use database BMS2_SED
If the proper database is not used, there are risks of having unknown DTCs and some DIDs will not be correctly computed.
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.

Target.Name: BMS2_SED_SW610
Target.Description:
CAREFUL : ==> This database is only fully compliant with BMS2 SED for SW610 - If SW600 is used, please use database named "BMS2_SED_SW600" - If older version is used (from SW300 to 510), please use "BMS2_SED_SW5xx"
If the wrong database is used, you might have some unknown DTC and some DIDs will not compute correctly.
SW610 update : 18/07/2015 :
- DIDs update for APV tool. "Format" added for DID : $9175 ,$9176, $91D4, $91D5, $9809, $9005, $9006, $9010, $900B, $9011, $912A, $900C, $900D, $900E, $9007, $9009 All Cell Voltages (1 to 20) ==> $9021 to $ 9034 $912D, $91DA, $9008, $900A, $901E, $901F, $900F, $91C6, $91C7, $9801, $9803, $9802, $9804, $980A, $91C2, $91C9

Target.Name: RBMS_SCPU_SW1xx_3xx_V1.0
Target.Description:
BMS DDT Database only compliant for SW BMS2_SW3xx. Not to be used for others SW versions.
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the managemServices ent of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ v 1.2 : 2011-04-20 : Switch English v 1.1 : 2011-02-01 : Laurent TRABATTONI / Olivier BAUX: Sce 65676 : Modification for OutputControl v 1.0 : 2010-09-30 : Laurent TRABATTONI : Sce 65676 : Initial release
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ********************************************************************************
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

Target.Description:
Database for SED, based on reactivity table V1.11 Valid for SW521 and following SW ---------------------------------------------------------------
PDE : Pierre-Emmanuel ROGER Conceptor of DDT Base : Eric MOUNIER
DE-MEE3 Le 28/01/2015
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
________________________
Correction du 13/04/2015
Modification de la variable DTCDeviceIdentifier contenu dans chaque requete en service 19 (Little Endian --> Big Endian) La réponse aux requettes 222071, 222072, 222073 passent de 5 octets à 4 octets
Les services 1081, 10C0, 1085 passent respectivement à 1001, 1003, 1002.
Autoident en Vdiag4.
________________________
Correction du 08/09/15 - PE ROGER base mise à jour pour le SW520/521. Nouveaux DTC et DID ajoutés.
Nouveaux DTC : $080282, $08031C, $081264, $0817xx , $0818xx , $0819xx , $0820xx , $0821xx ,$0822xx ,$0823xx ,$0824xx $0825xx ,$0826xx ,$0827xx ,$0828xx ,$0829xx ,$0830xx.
DTC supprimés : $0816FC , $081419, $08028F
Evolution DTC : $081511 devient maintenant $081514
____________________________
Correction du 06/10/15 - PE ROGER
Ajout DTC $081025
_____________________________
Correction du 09/11/15 - PE ROGER
Ajout des informations pour AUTOIDENT

Target.Name: SCCM420_Kostal_0x4002_00.02.01.ddt
Target.Description:
Note: A formal request/response parameter xx, yy, zz,... is only relevant, if its data have a formal specification within the same chapter. Kostal VS11 : 0x4002
Steering Column Control Module for the car line 420 (SCCM 420 / SCCM VS11) with a
CAN-Interface for the Chassis Network and a CAN-Interface for the Steering Wheel.
The entry variant has no CAN-Interface for the Steering Wheel, but a voltage coded horn instead.
The Steering Column Control Module provides the diagnosis functionality:
T urn I ndicator S witch diagnosis
F ront W iper S witch diagnosis
R ear W iper S witch diagnosis
T ip W iper S witch diagnosis
H igh B eam/Flashlight S witch diagnosis
Failure management S teering A ngle S ensor diagnosis
Module specific information

Target.Description:
6-feb-14 ------------------- LR2 Draft version release with few resources delition (XBA CO from X52) -------------------- 04-April-2014 As per XBA requirement DDT Builder updated --------------------- 8-May-2014 With JCI(Sumit) Cluster diagnostic input data Builder was modifed (Satya) 15-05-2015 - naveen - checked all screens with X52 for incoherency.. everything is alright errors 0 : 16-05-2014 ---------------------- 19_May_2014 9 DiDs are added to the session from X52 checked all screens with X52 for incoherency.. everything is alright except Output.control Screen. ---------------------- 27-05-2014 DDT resources modifyed as per XBA requirement ------------------------(V2.3 --> V2.4) Naveen - 09 06 2104 - not uploaded into central server in "Data" -->Drive_style_red_threshold, Drive_style_yellow_threshold - 'format' value "d" deleted - (19-06-14) "speed_set_in_cluster" data added into "Output control screen" and also 'Data' value changed to numeric output command screen updated - 26-06-14 30-jun-14 red_threshold data added to button in drive style screen ------------------------naveen V2.5 renamed file from 2.4 to 2.5 (2.4 was updated through a long way to make a difference the file is renamed)- basically there is NIL differnce between V2,4 and V2,5 ------------------naveen V2.6 (08-07-2014) deleted 310200 - (08-07-2014) deleted below swohn 3 status messages in Pixals IO Control -> data -> display check control command (high series) ONLY Color 1 ON ONLY Color 2 ON ONLY Color 3 ON ------------------------------------------------------------- 04-11-2014 DTC 9408, DTC 9412 - " the DTCs are added for hiding Unknown DTC in DDT player ------------------------------------------------------------- 11-11-2014 2180 part numbers updated to match XBA ------------------------------------------------------------- V2.9 Vignesh KK 05 July 2017 Added the following requests, with respective data. For accomodating new regulations.

RCM (Roof Control Unit) / Unite controle de toit Projet : E33 Damien PERROT (ITlink) - 01 69 82 83 18
Version 7 : Inversion capteurs couvercle G et D sur écran RCM status seul (pas de modification DTC capteurs couvercle D et G)
Version 6: -> déplacement du bit HallSensorActivationStatus.RCM_DID_HallSensor5_Status
Version 5 : -> Inversion capteurs AVD et AVG & Inversion capteurs couvercle G et D -> Suppression super-securité dans écran -> Compteur cycle + compteur km corrigés -> Normalisation nom DID HallsensorActivationStatus -> Ajout auto iden soft 3.0.x et 4.0.x
Version 4 : -> Ajout bouton Routine -> CRC sur 2 octets ald 3 octets
Version 3 : Ajout de paramètres -> incompatible avec proto A et base v2 pour tout ce qui est LIN et CCM (problème littre endian/big endian) -> suppression écran LIN (remplacé par diag CCM) -> correction longueur de CRC et trame VIN
Version 2 : Modifications apportées 21/11/08 AJOUT -> Désignation des capteurs dans ecran Roof status -> Ajout data ECU Identification ($F187) et Kit assembly ($F18E) -> Ecran CCM -> Ajout affichage trame RST_Roof_condition_display
MODIFICATION -> Lin Right Window position (little Endian) -> correction seuil ECU voltage, hall sensor supply Voltage ,... -> Suppression ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage, ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot, ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC, -> Routine completed and not OK (03 ald 04) -> version logiciel

Target.Name: UBP - X10 Version 2.1
Target.Description: UBP GEN09 (Projet X10) ---------------------- Pilot: Aymeric BRUNEAU (+33-1-768-51256 ---------------------- v1.0 - Creation of the diagnostic data base ---------------------- V1.1 1- Corrections of Manual bleeding procedure for the Pf-Lot (only compatible with B-sample ECU) - I/O Step3 + add tempo 1s between 10C0 and Step1 - I/O BOVc1 (Bit2 to Bit3) - Precision of the applicative perimeter (Only for B-sample ECU and Pf-Lot 2- Major change concern the update for S-Lot definition and C-sample ECU - add a Mode roller bench activation - add Torque blending monitoring informations - add Offset erasing for PWG and UBP sensors - add new screen "Energie measurement module" Not implemented in the Software => waitting for Project descision - add screen for new Evac & Fill + Manual bleeding sequences for S-Lot => will be coded for S-Lot ---------------------- V1.2 1- Corrections - correction gestion ref et fault type DTC 2- New screens & functions - add HBA function activation/desactivation - add Advanced diagnosis activation/desactivation - add screen for Advanced diagnosis datas memorized buffer - add routine for EV offset learning for S-lot - Manual bleeding procedure & sequences for S-lot ---------------------- V1.3 1- Corrections - F18E vehicule manufacturer spare part number - Creation of the screen 35 Manual bleeding with the add of step2 and 3a again at the end - Update of the screen 33, 34 for Manual bleeding procedure ---------------------- V1.4 - mise a jour manual bleeding apres 1er test sur SLot V1. - ajout auto iden ---------------------- V1.5 - mise a jour manual bleeding apres 2eme test sur SLot V1. ---------------------- V1.6 - mise à jour séquence 4c du manual bleeding . ---------------------- V1.7 - mise à jour DTC 508E ------- V1.8 - officialization - ajout auto iden ------- V1.9 - add reset soft - add data pump running cumulated ------- V2.0 - manual bleeding modification ------- V2.1 - manual bleeding modification

Target.Name: BCM_L43_L47_SW3_v1.03
Target.Description:
Laure DUTRONC tel 58573 - Vincent GRECO tel 56733
Base : Base diag X91 SWE puis L43 SW2
MODIFICATIONS
For SW3
1° Doorlock Function -Add I_TGATE_INSIDE_OPENER_SW in Reading Frame LID $61
ExLight Function Create Add in Ext Light Reading Calibration data frame and screen -CSW_INHIBIT_AFTER_RESET_TM_TP Create Add in Ext Light Reading BCM IO frame and screen R_BATT_SAVE_BY_BS_FNS_S
2° ajout du paramètre STEERINGLOCK_FRAME_PRESENT
3° modif du nom de la Start Routine APC forcé et mise a jour dans l'ecran Start routine
4° Rqt DataRead.BatteryVoltage (228000) answer was 62000100 becomes 62800000 Rqt DataRead.VehicleSpeed (228001) answer was 62000200 becomes 62800100 Rqt DataRead.ExternalTemperature (228002) answer was 62000300 becomes 62800200 Rqt DataRead.VehicleState (228003) answer was 62000400 becomes 62800300 Rqt DataRead./APCVoltage (228004) answer was 6200040000 becomes 6280040000 Rqt DataRead.VehicleSpeedForColumn (2280005) answer was 6200040000 becomes 6280050000 Rqt DataRead.Diagnosis_Flag (2280006 answer was 6200040000 becomes 6280060000
Ctrl_APC_By_Diag_Start (311100) answer was 701800 becomes 711100 Ctrl_APC_By_Diag_Stop (311200)answer was 701800 becomes 711200 SR_ACCEDER AU MODE MAINTENANCE (APC Forcé) (311100) answer was 701800 becomes 711100 SR_QUITTER MODE MAINTENANCE (APC Forcé) (311200)answer was 701800 becomes 711200
StatusOfDTC data format was Non Numeric becomes Numeric
AutoIdentification Only for L43 (remove X91Version)

Target.Name: BCM_L43_L47_SW4_v1.03
Target.Description:
Vincent GRECO tel 56733 MODIFICATIONS
SW4
Version 1.0 Vdiag = $C0 version 0400 VSC BadgeFreq_868 becomes VSC BadgeFreq_433K VSC NbTotalDeBadge_868_Appris becomes VSC NbTotalDeBadge_433K_Appris
Version 1.1 the diag datas Long press decoded exit and IH_engine_RPM are false, a comment has been added " Do not take into account"
Version 1.2 Create device with frames Read Historic lifter +Doorlock historic Read RKE Historic Read PASE Historic Read Doorlock BCM Input Output Status Read Door_lock_configuration frame read Ident $21$80 Modif of antenna area historic 0-29 values the Comment for value 6 becomes WAC START when scenario historic = 8 value 7 becomes WAC STOP when scenario historic = 8
Version 1.3 parameter VSC_WAC_Exit 1 - 6 Add the enum 2 = WAC is stopped by the last door closing, enging running correct the DTC Data declaration

Target.Name: BCM_X91_L43_S&S_SWB_v1.30
Target.Description: MODIFICATIONS SW6 V1.5 Add Reading, Recording, DTC and Start Routine parameters Major Device are created Screen of readind and recording frames created V1.6 Pour continuer a fonctionner en Apprentissage classique en SW6 remise en l'etat des data et request suivantes VSC ModeAPV_AppUCH_Arme rajoute plus besoin en SW7 VSC ModeAPV_ReaffArme rajoute plus besoin en SW7 VSC ModeUsineArme rajoute plus besoin en SW7 Ajout Requete SR_Acceder au mode APV avec le param Code APV rajoute plus besoin en SW7 Changement de nom pour les datas BCM is blank, IMMO NB CID PAIRED S, et Get Last Configuration Error ces noms resterons Ok en SW7 V 1.7 Modif Pour A Ibazizen Start Routine name was "tester presence d'un bage" becomes " ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID " trame $57 : octet 6 bit 7 : Was VSC Code APV_Reconnu becomes IMMO_FLAG_APV_CODE_RECOGNIZED octet 6 bit 6 : was VSC Code APVDiponible becomes IMMO_FLAG_APV_CODE_AVAILABLE_S V1.8 et 1.9 The start routine Access and finish "mode maintenance" the feedback parameter was "Outputcontrol" and now becomes "RoutineEntryStatus" V1.10 Correct the DTC AUTO_START_CLUTCH V1.11 Correction of Pase Historic data enum V1.12 Adjust size of Fal Screen answer of Frame 2168 correct the position of I_Card_SWitch_Present and In Fal Record History corrected the reading of VehiclestateSSextension V1.13 finalize Fal Record History SW7 V1.14 Modification for AP see Diag_Req 7.1 V1.14 AI Add AP items by AI Correct SR read extended Memory and SR Write extended memory V1.15 frame 2154 received frame lenght was 21 corrected to 20 bytes Correction AP screen V1.16 correct FAL Config and Protected pairing V1.17 Correct ReadDataBlockReadinIdentifier parameter carddata page 2 was in byte 12 now is in Byte 11 V1.18 Config Tpulse V1.19 add init 10c0 on Protected pairing screens V1.20 to V1.24 Minor V1.25 auto start authorization 2= Temporary 3 = definitely in data SSREH_SAV61_AUTOSTARTAUTHO and SSREH_SAV5 V1.26 SWC0 ECOMode V1.27 Add values 7,8 onCF_VSC_CAR_BODY V1.28 Add configuration ESCL_PRESENT_CF($3B 47) and DTC Bad ESCL Configuration($95 57) V1.29 TPMS regulation V1.30 TPMS regulation reading frame error update
